issues.reason: The final red-door precheck candidate at [9,1] is bypassable because [10,2] gives a second approach to redDoor [10,1]. After collecting redKey [8,1], the player can backtrack and open the red door from below without crossing [9,1], so the next monster stage cannot create reliable exit pressure there.
issues.required_change: Seal the lower approach by changing [10,2] to wall (1), or otherwise make [9,1] the only non-bypassable approach to redDoor [10,1] while keeping redKey [8,1] reachable.

required_changes: Seal [10,2] or otherwise remove the bypass around the [9,1] final red-door precheck candidate.
summary: Tracked quotas match the floor contract and remaining budget, no enemy tiles are placed, and the entrance free region exposes only one starter yellow key. The floor fails economy review only because the annotated final red-door combat candidate is bypassable from [10,2].
